title: Limit Concurrent Work with a Semaphore Channel in Go
summary: Limit concurrent Go work with a buffered channel semaphore and explicit acquire and release helpers.
highlights: Caps in-flight work with one channel
verification_notes: Run from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4. The verified test suite covers capacity validation, blocking and non-blocking acquire behavior, context cancellation, release reuse, and release safety.
